system.description:
Play the Saboteur if you want to use the environment to tip the scales in your favor. Gain access to the Midnight domain.

Foundation Features

Hack: Once per session, describe an unattended object in the area to hack for one benefit: give Overshield 1 to yourself and all allies; you and an ally clear a HP or a Stress; you gain 2 Hope or a handful of gold; or you learn one secret about the area.

Specialization Feature

Sabotage: When an adversary in Close range attacks, make a Knowledge Reaction Roll against their attack roll. When you succeed, spend a Hope to have them mark a Stress or reroll their attack.

Hacker: Once per long rest, when an adversary fails an attack, you may apply one temporary condition: Jammed, Shocked, or Staggered.

Mastery Feature

Hackst: You may use Hacker three times per long rest; each option once.

Demolitionist: Describe a technical item you wish to destroy within Far range, then make a Spellcast Roll. Once per long rest on a success, create a temporary hazardous area in Very Close range around the item. Creatures in the area must succeed on a Reaction Roll against the Spellcast result to escape. All creatures are Vulnerable while in the hazard.
